title: Go 1.26 Repository, pgx, Migrations, and Reproduction
description: The service runs from an unknown revision with an unrecorded compiler, floating PostgreSQL libraries, ad hoc schema edits, warm caches, and no clean reproduction. Learners cumulatively produce reproducible Go feed-service repository baseline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Capture revision, worktree, configuration, fixtures, secrets, migrations, licenses, and recovery anchor before editing.
Pin Go 1.26.5, pgx v5.10.0, goose v3.27.2, PostgreSQL 18.4, module sums, and supported platforms.
Keep command, application, domain, repository, fetch, parser, scheduler, HTTP, and presentation dependencies directed inward.
